title: Double Charge on Invoice
message: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription on the same day (May 3rd). My card shows two identical charges of $49.99 from your company. Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

title: Refund Request for Cancelled Order
message: I cancelled my order #48213 within the return window but it's been 10 days and I still haven't received my refund of $120. Can you please process this immediately?

title: Dark Mode Feature Request
message: It would be great if the dashboard supported a dark mode theme. Staring at the bright white screen at night is really hard on the eyes. Any plans to add this?

title: Delayed Delivery on Order
message: My order #77291 was supposed to arrive 5 days ago and the tracking page hasn't updated since it left the warehouse. Can someone tell me what's going on with my shipment?

title: Suspicious Account Activity / Possible Breach
message: I just got an email saying my password was changed but I didn't do that. I think someone hacked into my account. This is urgent, please lock my account immediately!

title: Enterprise Pricing Inquiry
message: We're a company of 500 employees looking to roll out your product org-wide. Could someone from sales reach out with enterprise pricing and volume discount options?

title: Trouble Configuring Integration
message: I'm trying to connect our Slack workspace to your app but the OAuth redirect keeps failing with a 'redirect_uri_mismatch' error. Can you walk me through the correct setup steps?

title: Export Button Produces Corrupted File
message: Every time I click 'Export to CSV' on the reports page, the downloaded file is corrupted and won't open in Excel. This started happening after yesterday's update.

title: Cannot Log Into Account
message: I can't log in at all. It keeps saying 'invalid credentials' even though I'm 100% sure my password is correct. I've tried three times and I'm locked out of work I need to finish today.

title: Payment Processing Down for All Customers
message: Our entire checkout flow is broken - every customer trying to pay gets a 500 error from your payment API. We are losing sales right now. This needs to be fixed immediately.

title: Cancel My Subscription
message: Please cancel my Pro subscription effective immediately. I no longer need the service and don't want to be billed again next month.

title: Incorrect Amount on Invoice
message: The invoice I received for last month (INV-2291) shows an amount that doesn't match my plan - it's $30 higher than what I agreed to when I signed up. Can you correct this?

title: API Endpoint Returning 500 Errors
message: Our production integration relies on your /v2/orders endpoint and it has been returning 500 Internal Server Error for the past 20 minutes. This is affecting our live systems.

title: Mobile App Crashes on Launch
message: The mobile app crashes immediately every time I try to open it after updating to the latest version. I've tried reinstalling but it still crashes on the splash screen.

title: Account Locked After Failed Attempts
message: My account got locked after too many failed login attempts, but those attempts weren't even me. I need access back urgently, I have a client presentation in an hour.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
message: I requested a password reset link twice but never received the email. I checked spam too. Can you help me reset my password another way?

title: International Order Stuck in Customs
message: My package has been stuck 'in customs' for two weeks according to the tracking. I ordered it for a birthday that already passed. What are my options at this point?

title: Unauthorized Charge - Possible Fraud
message: There is a charge on my account for a plan I never purchased. I think my payment info was compromised. Please investigate and reverse this charge, and help me secure my account.

title: Item Missing from Delivered Order
message: My order arrived today but one of the three items I ordered was missing from the box. The packing slip lists it but it wasn't inside. Can you send the missing item or refund it?

title: General Question About Support Hours
message: Hi, just wondering what your customer support hours are and whether you offer phone support in addition to email? Thanks!
